name: FinAudit-Graph 审计复核邮件通知

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { sent: true, mode: 'email_notification', review_task_id: 'FA-' + $node['整理邮件内容'].json.reporting_year + '-' + $execution.id, review_status: 'pending_review', review_priority: $node['整理邮件内容'].json.high_risk_count >= 2 ? 'urgent' : 'high', company_name: $node['整理邮件内容'].json.company_name, review_email: $node['整理邮件内容'].json.review_email, high_risk_count: $node['整理邮件内容'].json.high_risk_count, message: 'High-risk audit result was sent to reviewer email and a review task was created.' } }}

={{ { sent: false, mode: 'no_email_needed', review_task_id: 'FA-' + $json.reporting_year + '-' + $execution.id, review_status: $json.review_email ? 'archived' : 'email_not_configured', review_priority: 'normal', company_name: $json.company_name, high_risk_count: $json.high_risk_count, review_email_configured: Boolean($json.review_email), message: $json.review_email ? 'No high-risk audit result, email skipped and result archived.' : 'AUDIT_REVIEW_EMAIL is empty, email skipped.' } }}
